backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for G&S Medical backend, defining data types (Medicine, SellerAccount, Customer, etc.) and implementing CRUD operations, user authentication, access control, approval workflows, and site content management.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting a single completed feature: replacing the founder profile photo src in HomePage.tsx with a newly generated asset at a specific public path.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short human-readable summaries describing each file's purpose and key implementation details.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark modes.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the G&S Medical React SPA, mounting the app into a root div and loading the Vite/TypeScript entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes (home, admin, seller, customer, chat) and wraps the app in ThemeProvider and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/admin/MedicineMa: Admin CRUD interface for medicines, featuring a table of medicine rows (each fetching its own data), and dialogs for adding, editing, and deleting medicines.
frontend/src/components/admin/SellerMana: Admin CRUD interface for seller accounts with an inline status-change dropdown, and dialogs for editing and deleting sellers.
frontend/src/components/admin/WebsiteCon: Admin editor that renders individual save-able fields for configurable site content keys (hero headline, about text, announcements, etc.) with character-count validation.
Reusable wrapper component that uses IntersectionObserver to trigger CSS entrance animations (fade-up, fade-in, slide-left, slide-right) on scroll, with reduced-motion support.
frontend/src/components/ChatWidget.tsx: Floating chat widget with a toggle button and popup window that displays a bot/user message thread, quick-question shortcuts, and a text input, styled with a pink background and emerald header.
frontend/src/components/MedicineCard.tsx: Presentational card component that displays a medicine's image, name, category, description, price, stock, and availability badge with hover animations.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive top navigation bar with scroll-aware styling, smooth-scroll section links, and customer auth login/logout controls including a mobile hamburger menu.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the /admin login page, wrapping protected admin content.
frontend/src/components/SellerCard.tsx: Card UI component displaying a seller's name, status badge, phone, address, and license number, navigating to the seller detail page on click.
frontend/src/components/SellersSection.t: Landing page section that fetches and renders active seller cards in a responsive grid, with loading skeletons and an empty-state fallback.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, returning either an authenticated or anonymous actor based on the current Internet Identity, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: Provides simple admin authentication using hardcoded credentials stored in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useCustomerAuth.ts: Manages customer authentication token persistence in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication provider and hook using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and exposing status flags via React context.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend data operations including sellers, medicines, site content, and customers, wrapping actor calls with useQuery and useMutation.
frontend/src/hooks/useSellerAuth.ts: Manages seller authentication token persistence in localStorage, exposing login, logout, and isAuthenticated state.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a G&S Medical emerald-green and gold theme via CSS custom properties along with utility classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that renders the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: Admin dashboard page with a sidebar navigation that switches between overview stats, medicine management, seller management, and website content editor tabs.
frontend/src/pages/AdminLoginPage.tsx: Renders the admin login page with email/password form, handles authentication via useAuth hook, and redirects to the admin dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the customer login page with email/password form, calls the customer login mutation, and redirects to the home page on success or shows a registration success message.
frontend/src/pages/CustomerSignUpPage.ts: Renders the customer registration form with validation for name, email, password, and phone fields, then calls the register mutation and redirects to the login page on success.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Renders the public-facing home page including a hero section, sellers section, stats, and contact info, fetching active sellers via a query hook.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDashboard.tsx: Renders the authenticated seller dashboard displaying seller profile details and status, with logout functionality and redirect to login if unauthenticated.
frontend/src/pages/SellerDetailPage.tsx: Displays a public seller profile page fetched by ID, showing contact info, status badge, license details, and join date, with loading skeletons and a not-found state for inactive/missing sellers.
frontend/src/pages/SellerLoginPage.tsx: Renders the seller login form with email/password fields, handles authentication via useSellerLogin and useSellerAuth hooks, and redirects to the seller dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/SellerSignUpPage.tsx: Provides a seller registration form with validation for all required fields, submits via useRegisterSeller, and shows a success confirmation or server error messages upon completion.
frontend/src/utils/chatbot.ts: Defines store contact info and a pattern-matching FAQ array used to generate chatbot responses for common queries about orders, medicines, delivery, pricing, and seller registration.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading URL query parameters (supporting both standard and hash-based routing), persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL hash.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom fonts (Outfit, Playfair Display), OKLCH-based color tokens (emerald, gold, sidebar, chart), custom border radii, box shadows, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state manifest (version 19) for the G&S MEDICAL website, documenting the summary, architectural notes (admin credentials, contact info), known issues, image requirements, and a detailed registry of all existing and planned features including homepage, admin dashboard, seller management, AI assistant, and authentication.
